'''Derc''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] in the popular [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] ''[[Zeltrons in Love]]'' that released episodes during the [[Post-Imperial era/Legends|Post-Imperial era]]. In one episode, which was only broadcast once due to legal threats, Derec discussed his failed attempt to seduce a beautiful [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|women]] with the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] [[Jojo (holodrama character)|Jojo]]. Jojo eventually suggests that Derc use a [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromone]] producing [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]] called the [[Essence of Zeltros]].<ref name="Pleasure Planet" />

==Behind the scenes==
Derc appeared in ''[[Zeltros: Pleasure Planet]]'', a ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published online by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[2004]].<ref name="Pleasure Planet" />
